item.title: Ukrainian slider exits Games over helmet protest
item.description: Ukrainian skeleton athlete Vladyslav Heraskevych will not compete after refusing a last-minute plea from the IOC to use a helmet other than the one th...

item.title: BYU receiver Kingston charged with felony rape
item.description: The first-degree charge against Parker Kingston comes after a nearly yearlong investigation, the Washington County (Utah) Attorney's Office said.

item.title: KD laughs off ASG competition, jabs at Luka, Jokic
item.description: Kevin Durant took a playful jab at Luka Doncic, Nikola Jokic and the rest of the NBA All-Star World team when asked how hard his own U.S. squad of LeB...

item.title: Ratcliffe 'sorry' for language in immigration claims
item.description: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has said he is sorry if he has "offended some people" by saying the United Kingdom has been "colonized by...
